adversary-deep — a DEEP delivery package that PASSES `gate-check adversary`.

The CONTRACT declares a rotation state machine with three failure states
(PARTIAL_FAILED, ROLLED_BACK, ESCALATED) plus recovery/compensation edges. The
epic's Test Contract asserts every declared failure state as a case outcome
(D-B1), hooks the one governance rule G-1 by reference (D-B2), and covers all
five cascade classes (D-B3). Expected: exit 0.

Dot-prefixed so gate-check's collectMdFiles walker skips it (never counted as
coverage text).
